name: Mrs Fields Original Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Put oatmeal in blender and blend until it becomes a fine powder. Set aside.
2. Grate the Hershey bar or grate it by hand and set aside.
3. Cream together butter, sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl.
4. In another bowl, mix together oatmeal, flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Blend the butter and sugar mixture into the dry ingredients until well combined.
6. Add chocolate chips and grated Hershey bar to the dough.
7. Form the dough into golf ball-sized balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 6 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
